Our Menu

Every craving, covered.

From sizzling tandoor to creamy curries — crafted fresh, served hot.

Must Try

Our signatures

🔥
Full Stop Special Mutton
Slow cooked Rogan Josh style mutton in rich spices. The crown jewel of our menu. Available in Half & Full portions.
₹299 / ₹589
🌿
Achari Paneer Tikka
Paneer marinated in tangy pickle spices, char-grilled to perfection in our clay tandoor. A vegetarian masterpiece.
₹249
🍗
Malai Chicken Tikka
Tender chicken in creamy malai marinade. Melt-in-mouth texture with a delicate char. Crowd favourite every single time.
₹289
🧄
Garlic Naan
Hand-stretched, baked in our blazing tandoor, slathered with garlic butter. The perfect companion to every curry.
₹59
